title: 謎解きオーディション開始♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm, maybe let's take one more? Rice, Urara, squeeze in a little bit! ♪
Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#Selfie #AuditioningNow #ReadyToRiddle #LetsDoThis
#CheerUsOn" Okay, all set! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, these photos will make for lovely memories. ...By the by, when
is the audition supposed to begin?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It has been a while since each team was guided into separate rooms.
Could this time spent waiting be a part of the audition too?

"Bum-ba-ba-buuum! Beauty Channel! ♪ Just kidding! Bonjour,
everyone, this is Beauty Anshinzawa!"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Where's this voice... coming from?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I think I know! The sound's coming from that computer over there!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
We've gathered a whole bunch of beautiful gems again this year, and
I couldn't be happier! First, let me explain the rules of the audition! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
This year's trial comes in the form of riddles! Each team will be tasked
with solving three riddles in order to find the chapel key somewhere
within this hotel!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The first two riddles will be different for each team and take place in
different locations. Only teams that solve the first two riddles...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Will earn the chance to tackle the final riddle in this "Special Room"
that I'm in right now.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Teams that solve all three riddles and obtain the chapel key will get
the chance to tell me what my racewear means to them with a
beautiful proposal!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to hearing your passionate vows—ones worthy of an
engagement to my racewear. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course, don't forget that I'll also be taking into account the beauty
each of you gemstones shows off while solving riddles! In any case,
you have until sunset today.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Then without any further ado, let the Beauty Dream Cup muse
audition begin! May this year's audition be as brilliant as the last! ☆

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the audition's really started! I've got butterflies, but let's all do
our best!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Oh... but where's the riddle we have to solve?

text_block_list.name: Polite Staff
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, I have a delivery for this room.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I see, so each team gets their own riddle sent to their room. ...Well
then, let's see what this letter says.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: "Solve the riddle below to obtain the item you seek."

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
"Up in a gallery heaven-high, 10 becomes 1, and 100 becomes 10.
There, travel towards the queen's summit. The theater's symphony
shall sway the zelkova, before flowing towards the capital."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Up in a gallery heaven-high..." That's the first place we need to go
to, I'm guessing?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ah, this is just an idle thought, but perhaps it refers to this hotel's
observation deck?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
An observation deck! I didn't even know this hotel had one. Have you
stayed here before, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I haven't, but I was shown the guide map when we arrived earlier. It's
standard protocol between my security and me to prepare for
emergencies.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now if I recall, the map stated, "With an outer perimeter of 100
meters, our 250-meter tall observation deck provides a 360-degree
panoramic view of the city!"

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Fine, you remembered all those details?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she's had to memorize plenty of speeches... A truly
astute—excuse me, got a little carried away. We were heading to the
observation deck, correct?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! We're so high up! Hey hey, do you think we can see Tracen
from here?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Judging by this view, the school's probably located somewhere
behind you. Still, we should focus on the riddle for now, Urara.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Right, we need to focus! Um, by "10 becomes 1, and 100 becomes
10," do you think we need to count something?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Counting? Oh, like people? Or buildings?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wonder... This is an audition for racewear, so I bet the riddle's got something to do with racing. Let's see, the riddle went...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"Up in a gallery heaven-high, 10 becomes 1, and 100 becomes 10.
There, travel towards the queen's summit. The theater's symphony
shall sway the zelkova, before flowing towards the capital."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Putting aside the numbers for now... When you think of races and
theaters, it's gotta be the Hanshin Racecourse in Takarazuka, right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That would be a logical conclusion. The last time I was invited to
watch a race there, we went to see a performance afterwards. In that
case, by "zelkova," it means...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The big zelkova trees at Tokyo Racecourse! ♪ And if we assume that
the last part about "flowing towards the capital" is about the Yodo
River that flows near Kyoto Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Then "travel towards the queen's summit" must refer to the Oka Sho,
the Japanese Oaks, and the Shuka Sho—in other words, the Triple
Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! We have to go to Hanshin Racecourse right now?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... Do we even have time to go to all three racecourses before
sunset?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, you two. This is just a riddle, so I doubt we have to
physically go to each racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Most likely, the key to solving this riddle lies in the hint, "10 becomes
1, and 100 becomes 10."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ikuno, that's it! ♪ I just figured it all out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
To be exact, we'll find our answer if we do laps around the deck! 1.6
laps to the right, then 2.4 laps to the left, and finally 2 laps to the
right!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The key hint came from Fine—the info on the hotel's guide map! ♪
